title: fix: remove phantom LiteAI entry from APPS.md
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Pruning the app garden
gist.blurb: We did a little weeding in the app showcase and removed a phantom entry. Keeping the community garden fresh, accurate, and full of real projects!
gist.summary: Removed a non-existent 'LiteAI' entry from the community apps showcase.
gist.impact: The community showcase is now more accurate, ensuring users only discover active and real projects.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee doing some gardening, removing a dead plant (representing the dead link) from a vibrant garden of glowing code-plants. Nomnom creature helping by eating the dead plant.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny gardener's hat, pulling a small withered pixel plant from a vibrant digital garden of glowing code-plants. The round Nomnom creature happily eats the withered leaves. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny gardener's hat, pulling a small withered pixel plant from a vibrant digital garden of glowing code-plants. The round Nomnom creature happily eats the withered leaves. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley.
